title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
